transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my toilet has no hot water and it's getting bad! This is Mark Henderson at 5 River Road. Dispatcher: Okay Mark, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 5 River Road right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: toilet has no hot water
